# fleetdm_version (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve version information about the FleetDM server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get Fleet server version information
data "fleetdm_version" "current" {}

output "fleet_version" {
  value = data.fleetdm_version.current.version
}

output "fleet_branch" {
  value = data.fleetdm_version.current.branch
}

output "fleet_revision" {
  value = data.fleetdm_version.current.revision
}

output "go_version" {
  value = data.fleetdm_version.current.go_version
}

# Example: Use version in a local for conditional logic
locals {
  fleet_major_version = split(".", data.fleetdm_version.current.version)[0]
  is_premium          = contains(["premium", "ultimate"], "premium") # Check license tier via configuration
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `branch` (String) The git branch from which the server was built.
- `build_date` (String) The date and time when the server was built.
- `build_user` (String) The user who built the server.
- `go_version` (String) The Go version used to build the server.
- `revision` (String) The git revision (commit hash) from which the server was built.
- `version` (String) The version of the FleetDM server.
